office_does: The coroner investigates reportable deaths, determines cause and manner, coordinates examinations, and serves families and partner agencies.
race_blurb: The race contrasts current coroner-office employee Johnathan Waldrop with Roseanne Ennis Jezerinac, whose approved dossier contains no detailed professional record.

candidates.summary: Waldrop has about three and a half years in the coroner office and emphasizes professional education, compassionate service, and partner-agency coordination.
highlights: Emphasizes education, integrity, and interagency partnerships [S2]

experience.basis: Current multi-year coroner-office service supplies a directly relevant institutional record, though no elected tenure.

candidates.summary: Official and local records verify Jezerinac’s candidacy but do not establish a detailed professional biography or coroner record.
